lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you able to offer any other services?

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: That depends... we mostly just sell clothes. What did you have in mind?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for some new shoes.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Hmm... It's not something I would normally sell, but I might be able to help you out.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: It's free to change your shoes here. You can choose a colour as well as a style, since I'm also stocking boots imported from elven lands.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Just select the model you would like from this catalogue.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you able to give me a haircut?

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Hah! Yeah, let me just go and grab my barbering equipment!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alrighty then.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Oh, you're serious? Well, I guess I'd silly to turn down extra business. I think I have and old pair of fabric scissors around here somewhere...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm interested in changing my gender.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: You're in a clothes store.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you at least try?

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Well, a friend of mine did show me a spell once. I'll see if I can remember it, but I'm making no promises...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Actually, nevermind.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Do you want to buy any fine clothes?

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Do you want to buy any fine clothes? Or would you like your scythe back?

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Do you want to buy any fine clothes? Or would you like your bunny ears back?

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Do you want to buy any fine clothes? Or would you like your scythe or bunny ears back?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What have you got?

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Well, I have a number of fine pieces of clothing on sale or, if you prefer, I can offer you an exclusive, total- clothing makeover?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more about this makeover.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Certainly!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Here at Thessalia's fine clothing boutique, we offer a unique service where we will totally revamp your outfit to your choosing.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: It's on the house, completely free! Tired of always wearing the same old outfit, day in, day out? This is the service for you!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: So what do you say? Interested? We can change either your top or your legwear!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Just select what style and colour you would like from this catalogue.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Wow! Good choice! You're looking great!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Totally cool! That outfit looks great!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Woah! Fabulous! You look absolutely great!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Very stylish! It really suits you!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: WoooOOOooo! Hot stuff!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Fantastic! You should be a model!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Just select what style and colour you would like from this catalogue.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Wow! Good choice! You're looking great!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Totally cool! That outfit looks great!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Woah! Fabulous! You look absolutely great!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Very stylish! It really suits you!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: WoooOOOooo! Hot stuff!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Fantastic! You should be a model!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Well, please return if you change your mind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a frog token...

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: That entitles you to a free costume! Do you want a frog mask, a royal tunic & leggings or a royal blouse & skirt? I've also got some lamps a strange blue chap gave me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A frog mask, please!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A royal tunic & leggings, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A royal blouse & skirt, please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take the reward lamp, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have my scythe back?

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Certainly. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Would you like to buy any clothes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I have my bunny ears back?

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Certainly. Here you go.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: Would you like to buy any clothes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a frog token...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have a frog token.

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: That entitles you to a free costume! Do you want a frog mask or a [prince/princess] outfit?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A frog mask, please!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: There you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A frog [prince/princess] outfit, please!

lines.speaker: Thessalia
lines.text: There you go!
